---
title: "Mapping Merge"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 0. Load Libraries & Data
# ==============================================================================
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)

admin3_lines <- st_read("source/gmb_admin_boundaries.shp/gmb_admin3_em.shp")
admin1_lines <- st_read("source/gmb_admin_boundaries.shp/gmb_admin1_em.shp")
map_data     <- read_csv("output/mapping_merged.csv")
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 1. Preparation
# ==============================================================================
plot_data_all <- map_data %>% filter(!is.na(center_lat), !is.na(center_lon))

gambia_colors <- c(
  "Cash deposited at bank (branch/bank agent/ATM)"       = "#F28C28",
  "Money transfer agencies (Western union, MoneyGram,"   = "#A12D8C",
  "Transfer via MFI/Bank"                                = "#E8C828",
  "Banking Transaction via internet / online / mobile"   = "#2D96A1",
  "Friends or family"                                    = "#3A7728",
  "Combination of many means, one of which is formal"    = "#CE1126",
  "Combination of many informal means"                   = "#0C1C8C",
  "Other"                                                = "#7F7F7F"
)
```

```{r}
# Admin 1 Centers (Excluding Banjul)
admin1_centers <- admin1_lines %>%
  sf::st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!stringr::str_detect(adm1_name, "Banjul")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label_y = case_when(
      adm1_name == "Kanifing Municipal Council" ~ 13.05,
      adm1_name == "West Coast"                ~ 13.15,
      adm1_name == "Lower River"               ~ 13.17,
      adm1_name == "North Bank"                ~ 13.75,
      adm1_name == "Central River North"       ~ 13.85,
      adm1_name == "Central River South"       ~ 13.10,
      adm1_name == "Upper River"               ~ 13.75,
      TRUE                                     ~ 13.5
    )
  )

# Banjul Data
banjul_data <- admin1_lines %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(adm1_name, "Banjul")) %>%
  sf::st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  )
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2. Aggregation & Plotting Function
# ==============================================================================
district_stats <- map_data %>%
  group_by(match_key) %>%
  summarise(
    n       = n(),
    dom_pct = mean(domestic_receive == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    int_pct = mean(international_receive == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    lat     = first(center_lat),
    lon     = first(center_lon)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lat))

plot_district_map <- function(data, value_col, title) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey80") +
    geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "grey20", size = 0.8) +
    # Admin 1 Labels
    geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
    # Banjul Label
    geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
    # Data Points
    geom_point(data = data, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = {{value_col}}, size = n), alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "#e0e0e0", high = "#d92121", limits = c(0, 50), oob = scales::squish) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
    coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
    theme_void() +
    labs(title = title, color = "% of Yes", size = "Sample Size")
}

map1 <- plot_district_map(district_stats, dom_pct, "Domestic Receive in the Past 12 Months (%)")
map2 <- plot_district_map(district_stats, int_pct, "International Receive in the Past 12 Months (%)")
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 3. Means of Receive Map
# ==============================================================================
plot_data_map3 <- plot_data_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(means_receive)) %>%
  mutate(clean_method = means_receive %>%
           str_replace("^[0-9]+\\.\\s*", "") %>%
           str_replace_all("\\?", "") %>%
           str_replace("\\s*\\(specify.*", "") %>%
           str_trim())

map3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "grey20", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data_map3, aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = clean_method), size = 1.8, alpha = 0.6, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = gambia_colors) +
  coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  labs(title = "Means of Receive", color = "Method") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 4. Agent Distance Map
# ==============================================================================
plot_data_dist <- map_data %>%
  filter(!str_detect(mobile_agent_distance, "Don")) %>%
  mutate(
    dist_val   = as.numeric(str_extract(mobile_agent_distance, "^[0-9]+")),
    clean_dist = str_replace(mobile_agent_distance, "^[0-9]+\\.\\s*", "")
  )

map4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data_dist, aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = dist_val), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#D92121", high = "#3A7728", breaks = c(1, 2, 3), labels = c("1. Less than 10m", "2. 10-20m", "3. 21-30m")) +
  coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Mobile Agent Distance", color = "Distance Category") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 5. Means of Saving Map
# ==============================================================================
plot_data_save <- map_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(save_method)) %>% 
  mutate(clean_save = save_method %>%
           str_replace("^[0-9]+\\.\\s*", "") %>% 
           str_replace_all("\\?", "") %>% 
           str_replace("\\s*\\(specify.*", "") %>%
           str_trim())

gambia_colors_2 <- c(
  "Microfinance Institution (MFI)"             = "#CE1126",
  "Bank"                                       = "#E8C828",
  "At home / secret place"                     = "#3A7728",
  "Cooperatives/Credit Unions"                 = "#0C1C8C",
  "Osusu"                                      = "#A12D8C",
  "friend (none household member)"             = "#F28C28",
  "Other household member or community member" = "#7F7F7F"
)

map5 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "grey20", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data_save, 
             aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = clean_save), 
             size = 1.8, alpha = 0.6, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = gambia_colors_2) + 
  coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  labs(title = "Where do you mainly save the money", color = "Method") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 6. Remittances Out
# ==============================================================================
plot_data_f2b <- map_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(send_country)) %>%
  mutate(send_country = str_replace_all(send_country, "(.)(?!$)", "\\1,")) %>%
  separate_rows(send_country, sep = ",") %>%
  mutate(clean_country = recode(send_country, 
    "A"  = "Senegal",
    "B"  = "Guinea (Conakry)",
    "E"  = "Mali",
    "F"  = "Sierra Leone",
    "C"  = "Mauritania",
    "H"  = "Ghana",
    "N"  = "Nigeria",
    "L"  = "Liberia",
    "D"  = "Other West Africa (specify)",
    "AF" = "Other African country (specify)"
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(clean_country))

f2b_colors <- c(
  "Senegal"                         = "#CE1126",
  "Guinea (Conakry)"                = "#0C1C8C",
  "Mali"                            = "#F28C28",
  "Sierra Leone"                    = "#A12D8C",
  "Mauritania"                      = "#E8C828",
  "Ghana"                           = "#7F7F7F",
  "Nigeria"                         = "#3A7728",
  "Liberia"                         = "#4682B4",
  "Other West Africa (specify)"     = "#FF6347",
  "Other African country (specify)" = "#20B2AA"
)

map6 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "grey20", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data_f2b, 
             aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = clean_country), 
             size = 1.8, alpha = 0.6, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = f2b_colors) +
  coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  labs(title = "Which country did you send money to?", color = "Country") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 7. Remittances In
# ==============================================================================
letter_map <- c(
  "A" = "UK", "B" = "USA", "C" = "Spain", "D" = "Italy",
  "E" = "Germany", "F" = "Sweden", "G" = "France", "H" = "Angola",
  "I" = "UAE", "J" = "Switzerland", "K" = "Norway", "L" = "Canada",
  "M" = "Libya", "N" = "Other European", "O" = "Other West Africa", 
  "P" = "Other African", "Q" = "Non-African"
)

plot_data_f9b <- map_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(receive_country), 
         !receive_country %in% c("0", "1")) %>% 
  mutate(split_country = str_split(receive_country, "")) %>%
  unnest(split_country) %>%
  filter(!split_country %in% c("R", "S")) %>%
  mutate(clean_country = recode(split_country, !!!letter_map)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(clean_country))

plot_data_f9b_clean <- plot_data_f9b %>%
  filter(!is.na(clean_country)) %>%
  filter(clean_country %in% c("UK", "USA", "Spain", "Italy", "Germany", 
                              "Sweden", "France", "Angola", "UAE", 
                              "Switzerland", "Norway", "Canada", "Libya", 
                              "Other European", "Other West Africa", 
                              "Other African", "Non-African")) %>%
  mutate(clean_country = droplevels(factor(clean_country)))

map7 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "grey20", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = admin1_centers, aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_segment(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = 13.8), color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = banjul_data, aes(x = x, y = 13.8, label = "Banjul"), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data_f9b_clean, 
             aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = clean_country), 
             size = 1.3, alpha = 0.6, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") + 
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5), ncol = 2)) +
  labs(title = "From which countries have you received money?", color = "Country") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 9), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
map7
```

```{r}
# Save Outputs
ggsave("output/domestic_receive_map.png", plot = map1, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/international_receive_map.png", plot = map2, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/means_of_receive_map.png", plot = map3, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/mobile_agent_distance_map.png", plot = map4, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/means_of_save_map.png", plot = map5, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/remittances_out_map.png", plot = map6, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/remittances_in_map.png", plot = map7, width = 8, height = 6)
```
